about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about Etqan IT Solutions, your trusted tech partner in digital transformation. A team of over 30 specialists serving clients in Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the Gulf.
about.heroDesc: From a small team in 2018 to over 30 specialized engineers serving clients across Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the Gulf. We deliver innovative tech solutions with the highest global quality standards.
about.storyText: Etqan was founded in 2018 with one goal: delivering world-class tech solutions for companies in the Arab region. We started with a small team of 3 passionate engineers, and today we've grown to over 30 specialists serving clients across Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and the Gulf.
about.visionText: To be the primary tech partner for every company seeking digital excellence in the Arab region.
about.missionText: Empowering companies to achieve their goals through innovative and reliable tech solutions.
about.valuesSub: The principles that guide our work
about.timelineSub: From humble beginnings to market leadership
about.whyUs1Desc: A team of specialized engineers with over 10 years of experience
about.whyUs2Desc: Every project is built from scratch based on your actual needs
about.whyUs3Desc: We commit to timelines and deliver on schedule
about.whyUs4Desc: Support team available to help even after project delivery
about.whyUs5Desc: High quality at prices that fit your budget
about.whyUs6Desc: Offices in Egypt and Saudi Arabia for better service
